narrative:
Walnut Twp (precinct in Gallia County) has 463 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.9 percentage points.
